items.summary: Update the background audio behavior so the chainsaw loop is forced on by default: set the chainsaw loop volume to 60% (0.6 on the HTMLAudioElement volume scale), attempt to autoplay on page load, and remove the user-facing sound on/off control and any "Enable sound" prompt UI from the site.

Add an automatic clown-laugh fallback audio that the site attempts to play when the chainsaw autoplay attempt is blocked or fails; the clown-laugh fallback should loop and should be attempted automatically (no user-facing controls).

Implement best-effort mitigation for browser autoplay restrictions without adding audio UI controls: after a blocked autoplay attempt, re-attempt starting the chainsaw loop (and then the clown-laugh fallback if needed) on common first-user-gesture events (e.g., click/tap, keydown, or pointerdown anywhere on the page) while keeping the experience control-free.
